h2: 6 Electric Fireplace DIYs You’ll Want to Recreate ASAP

paragraphs: Whether you’re yearning for some winter warmth to hush the chill in a northern climate, or are seeking a beautiful way to add nuance to your home, an electric fireplace fits the bill. From cost (low) to ease of installation (DIY-able) to cleanliness (no soot, ash, or dust), an electric fireplace can’t be beat.SimpliFire by Heat & Glo offers a wide array of electric fireplaces and installation options, and now we've added our most realistic electric fireplace yet: Inception. But why opt for an electric fireplace over gas or wood-burning? Here are just a few considerations:1. Installation is a breeze. No need to pull permits, access venting, or change anything structurally. You can even DIY it!2. No maintenance. Forget your yearly chimney sweep or tune-up—an electric fireplace is as easy to maintain as your microwave.3. Heat variability. You can choose to use your electric fireplace as a space heater (up to 1,000 square feet of heat coverage), or just enjoy the glow. A great option for year-round ambiance!

4. Use existing finishing options. Already have a mantel, but want to change out your firebox? An electric fireplace can do that. Prefer to place a fireplace where there’s never been one before? No problem. With an electric fireplace, all you need is an outlet and a wall.5. Energy-efficient. No need to worry about losing heat through your chimney. Any heat produced by an electric fireplace stays inside.6. Versatility. Many of our electric fireplaces offer various flame and ember-bed color choices.7. Remote control. Temperature control, lighting, and flame options are all accessible at the touch of your finger.8. Space optimizing. Maximize the functional space of your room. Relative to other fireplaces, electric fireplaces require a very minimal footprint, many only require 6”-8” of depth to install.

Whether the certain-something that draws you to an electric fireplace is design or delight, coziness or décor, our team at Heat & Glo is here and ready to help you make your dreams a reality. Schedule your complimentary pre-purchase consultation today.
